HomePage.title: Ángel Matos
HomePage.description_1: I am a web developer with a passion for building intuitive interfaces and clean code. My fascination with programming stems from seeing how technology transforms ideas into reality, from applications that solve real-world problems to user experiences that create impact.
HomePage.description_2: I specialize in frontend with React (Next.js/Vite) and mobile development with React Native, and I have expanded my skills towards the backend with Node.js, Express, and GraphQL. I work with databases such as MongoDB and PostgreSQL, and I use Docker and Docker Compose to set up environments and services consistently.
HomePage.description_3: If you're looking for someone passionate about code quality, committed to continuous learning, and eager to deliver solutions that truly make a difference, I'd love to connect. Let's build something great together!

Experience.title: Experience
Experience.timeline_description: A summary of my career and the projects I've worked on.
Experience.dga_desc_1: Development of modern web and mobile applications using the latest technologies in the JavaScript ecosystem.
Experience.dga_desc_2: Focus on creating intuitive interfaces, clean code, and scalable solutions that transform ideas into impactful digital products.
Experience.property_desc: Professional landing page for a real estate company, developed with Next.js (React 19) and TypeScript.

DockMenu.whatsapp_message: Hello Ángel, I saw your portfolio and I'm interested in your work.
